description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Changelog and Release that updates the changelog and news, bumps the version, and creates a release on a given branch. The workflow is triggered by a workflow dispatch event with inputs for version type, changelog text, update news, and add date. It checks out the repository and required scripts, installs dependencies, sets up Python 3.9, increments the version and updates changelogs, commits changes, pushes to the triggering branch, sleeps for 60 seconds, and creates a release with a generated tag and body.
